mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
